task_summary: Build the admin forums management page at /admin/forums exposing full categories + boards CRUD, consuming the forums-admin-client from CO8.
validation_commands_run: pnpm --filter web run build (via main repo with page.tsx temporarily copied in)
validation_outcome: All pass. typecheck: clean. lint (--max-warnings=0): clean. vitest: 436 tests pass (2 pre-existing worktree react-resolution failures confirmed pre-existing). next build: 28 routes including /admin/forums, clean.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: /admin/forums gated like other admin pages — resolveProtectedSession redirect, non-admin denied, admin sees page
AC2: Lists all categories with boards via adminListCategories
AC3: Category CRUD — create/edit/delete/reorder; no-boards delete surfaced as friendly message
AC4: Board CRUD — create/edit/delete/reorder with full field set including scopeType and visibility
AC5: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML; user text as React nodes; encodeURIComponent on URL segments
AC6: Errors surfaced via standard envelope as friendly messages
test_location_guidance: apps/web/app/admin/forums/forums-admin.spec.ts — source-audit pattern matching forums-admin-client.spec.ts and public-shell.spec.ts
implementation_context: New page only, no existing files modified. Reuses auth-shell.module.css. Category delete proactively checks boards.length>0 client-side and catches 400 API responses. All text as React nodes. encodeURIComponent handled by client module on API calls.
expected_validation_failures: components/authoring-components.spec.ts and components/user-avatar.spec.ts: pre-existing worktree react-resolution failures, not regressions from CO9
